promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong bounded Stage16 sims reduction after the successor-bundle provenance pass and because the parent batch already isolates the mixed-family seam cleanly.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates one mixed-axis6 question-family, the paired-control versus sweep contract split, the exact sub4 baseline anchoring rule, the catalog-versus-top-level-evidence gap, and the control-versus-sweep signal asymmetry.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary batch was used for the nearest catalog/evidence separation packet, while the sim_suite_v1 and sim_suite_v2 Stage16 packets were used as nearby descendant-lineage warnings so this local family is not confused with later versioned Stage16 surfaces.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because this pass focuses on the mixed family and its exact baseline relation rather than the standalone absolute baseline surface.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent mixed-axis6 family batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary and nearby Stage16 provenance-drift A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable contract-split, exact-baseline-anchor, evidence-gap, and signal-asymmetry packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: STAGE16_MIXED_AXIS6_QUESTION_FAMILY_WITH_CONTRACT_SPLIT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest structural read: one family survives, but the executable contracts remain distinct.

candidate_items.name: PAIRED_CONTROL_VERSUS_SWEEP_MODE_NONINTERCHANGEABILITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the smallest reusable numeric anti-flattening rule without carrying forward full result tables.

candidate_items.name: SUB4_AXIS6U_EXACT_UNIFORM_BASELINE_ANCHOR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's cleanest bridge between the mixed family and the standalone absolute baseline surface without merging them.

candidate_items.name: CATALOG_STAGE16_TRIO_WITH_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCE_ABSENCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest reusable admission-boundary packet in the parent batch.

candidate_items.name: CONTROL_LOCALITY_VERSUS_SWEEP_SCALE_ASYMMETRY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's cleanest compact signal from the result highlights without flattening the family into one magnitude scale.

candidate_items.name: CONTROL_SE_REGION_VERSUS_SWEEP_SI_REGION_DOMINANCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's sharpest stage-specific anti-flattening packet: control and sweep peak in different regions of the lattice.

quarantined_items.name: SAME_COMPUTATION_JUST_MORE_MODES_STORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves different executable comparison contracts, so this flattening would erase the main contradiction.

quarantined_items.name: EXACT_BASELINE_EQUALITY_AS_FAMILY_MEMBERSHIP
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Exact baseline equality is weaker than bounded-family identity and would incorrectly merge the absolute anchor into the mixed family.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_MEMBERSHIP_AS_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCE_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog coverage is structural and weaker than the explicit zero-block top-level evidence outcome preserved by the parent batch.

quarantined_items.name: ONE_UNIFORM_PERTURBATION_SCALE_ACROSS_CONTROL_AND_SWEEP
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves small localized control shifts and larger mode-sensitive sweep excursions.

quarantined_items.name: CONTROL_SE_DOMINANCE_AS_FULL_SWEEP_MAP
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves sweep dominance at type2 inner 4_Si_DOWN rather than the Se-focused control region.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable Stage16 signals: one family with a contract split, exact but nonmerged baseline anchoring, catalog-versus-evidence separation, and numeric asymmetry across scale and dominant cell.
They preserve the mixed-axis6 family as a contradiction-rich local comparison unit without letting catalog grouping, baseline identity, or shared family naming self-authorize a flattened story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later Stage16 or sims lineage work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain flattening stories or evidence-strength overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used the sims evidence-boundary and the two nearby Stage16 descendant-lineage A2-mid batches as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded Stage16 mixed-family contradiction reprocess pass.
